title: I connected ChatGPT to live candles data, would love to hear your feedback
author: Ti_Guardo_Per_Sempre
selftext:
Hi, I've built this platform where you can visualise financial markets data and prompt an AI agent (ChatGPT wrapper) providing the real-time data context. Please check it out at [https://www.aulico.com](https://www.aulico.com)

So far it saved me a lot of time because it generated the technical indicators that you're seeing the platform. I'm really curious about other use cases and how I could improve it :)  
Please comment for a free paid plan, I'm at a validation stage looking for feedback

comments.author: onemanlionpride
comments.body: Does this work for futures too or just forex?

comments.author: Nearby_Affect_2394
comments.body: This is awesome! Loving the concept, and it seems really promising.

comments.author: w0j4k_
comments.body:
I guess the best validation you could get is to see whether it actually helps you and other users make a profit.

Does it point out things you would have normally missed?

I think you also need to validate whether its suggested indicators actually make sense to you and other traders.

I'd love to see this work but this sort of thing always makes me sceptical. GPT (and others) remains a language model and nothing more than that, and it should be treated accordingly. To make matters worse, it tends to hallucinate a lot in my experience. 

Not saying it doesn't have any valid use cases, but I wouldn't trust it to get reliable information, let alone with any decision making.

comments.author: expressionzzy
comments.body: I need the free paid plan

comments.author: No-Guarantee-748
comments.body: Can I get it on the free plan for now?

comments.author: roulettewiz
comments.body: Sounds sexy! Commenting for reach and access.

comments.author: After-Cricket4280
comments.body: Interested in the free paid plan, this looks promising \^\_\^
